title: The Social Security Benefits Up-rating Order 2026, Article 14
body: Increase in rates of Disability Living Allowance. In regulation 4 of the Social Security (Disability Living Allowance) Regulations 1991 (rate of benefit): in paragraph (1)(a) for "£110.40" substitute "£114.60"; in paragraph (1)(b) for "£73.90" substitute "£76.70"; in paragraph (1)(c) for "£29.20" substitute "£30.30"; in paragraph (2)(a) for "£77.05" substitute "£80.00"; and in paragraph (2)(b) for "£29.20" substitute "£30.30".
